infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You are in a 厨房. An usual one. You begin looking for stuff.

 You can make out [if c_1 is locked]a locked[else if c_1 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] food waste bin.[if c_1 is open and there is something in the c_1] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_1].[end if][if c_1 is open and the c_1 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You see [if c_10 is locked]a locked[else if c_10 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] other waste bin close by.[if c_10 is open and there is something in the c_10] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_10].[end if][if c_10 is open and the c_10 contains nothing] The other waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You make out a recyclable bin.[if c_4 is open and there is something in the c_4] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_4]. You idly wonder how they came up with the name TextWorld for this place. It's pretty fitting.[end if][if c_4 is open and the c_4 contains nothing] The recyclable bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can make out [if c_7 is locked]a locked[else if c_7 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] hazardous waste bin close by.[if c_7 is open and there is something in the c_7] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_7].[end if][if c_7 is open and the c_7 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if]

You don't like doors? Why not try going west, that entranceway is unguarded.

infos.name: 小区投放点
infos.desc:
You arrive in a 小区投放点. A typical one. You start to take note of what's in the room.

 You can make out a food waste bin.[if c_0 is open and there is something in the c_0] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_0].[end if][if c_0 is open and the c_0 contains nothing] The food waste bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] You see [if c_3 is locked]a locked[else if c_3 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] recyclable bin.[if c_3 is open and there is something in the c_3] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_3].[end if][if c_3 is open and the c_3 contains nothing] The recyclable bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] You can make out [if c_6 is locked]a locked[else if c_6 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] hazardous waste bin, which looks normal, in the corner.[if c_6 is open and there is something in the c_6] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_6].[end if][if c_6 is open and the c_6 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] Look over there! an other waste bin. The light flickers for a second, but nothing else happens.[if c_9 is open and there is something in the c_9] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_9]. Huh, weird.[end if][if c_9 is open and the c_9 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if]

There is an unguarded exit to the east. You need an unblocked exit? You should try going south.

infos.name: 家中
infos.desc:
Ah, the 家中. This is some kind of 家中, really great ordinary vibes in this place, a wonderful ordinary atmosphere.

 Oh, great. Here's an other waste bin. You check the price tag that the other waste bin's owner still hasn't taken off. 85 bucks? What a deal! You'll have to ask where they got this![if c_11 is open and there is something in the c_11] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_11]. There's something strange about this thing being here, but you don't have time to worry about that now.[end if][if c_11 is open and the c_11 contains nothing] The other waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can make out [if c_2 is locked]a locked[else if c_2 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] food waste bin.[if c_2 is open and there is something in the c_2] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_2]. Now why would someone leave that there?[end if][if c_2 is open and the c_2 contains nothing] The food waste bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] You can see [if c_5 is locked]a locked[else if c_5 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] recyclable bin.[if c_5 is open and there is something in the c_5] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_5].[end if][if c_5 is open and the c_5 contains nothing] The recyclable bin is empty! This is the worst thing that could possibly happen, ever![end if] Look over there! a hazardous waste bin. You wonder idly who left that here.[if c_8 is open and there is something in the c_8] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_8]. You wonder idly who left that here.[end if][if c_8 is open and the c_8 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if]

You don't like doors? Why not try going north, that entranceway is unblocked.

insert floor dust into other waste bin

insert plastic bottle into recyclable bin

insert shampoo bottle into recyclable bin
take tea leaves
insert tea leaves into food waste bin
take paint bucket
insert paint bucket into hazardous waste bin

insert used battery into hazardous waste bin
take glass bottle

insert apple core into food waste bin

objective: 把垃圾投放到正确类别：尘土→其他垃圾、塑料瓶→可回收物、易拉罐→可回收物、洗发水空瓶→可回收物、茶叶渣→厨余垃圾、油漆桶→有害垃圾、废电池→有害垃圾、玻璃瓶→可回收物、荧光灯管→有害垃圾、苹果核→厨余垃圾
